microsoft_ft: Served as the **primary technical partner** across 45+ annual Azure resilience drills for enterprise clients (Databricks, Walmart, SAP, NetApp), scoping integrations, validating data flows, and driving **$14M+ in business impact** through trusted client engagements.

Led 0→1 delivery of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining product requirements, APIs, and self-service scheduling workflows that **reduced operational toil by 30%** and scaled execution across cross-functional engineering stakeholders.

Pioneered Azure's first **proactive resilience testing** capability, shipping a rack-level drill program in 4 months at a **94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and codifying a repeatable measurement and validation pattern.

Directed 14 cross-org recovery executions under executive visibility, including bridge lead for a **sovereign-cloud network isolation test** tied to a **$1.5B+ enterprise contract**, translating complex technical concepts into clear client-facing narratives.

Built an internal **AI agent** and AI-assisted planning workflows that accelerated technical discovery, troubleshooting, and documentation — cutting planning cycle time by **39%** and increasing drill capacity by **21%**.

Authored integration patterns, runbooks, and best-practice documentation consumed by partner teams and enterprise clients, standardizing how Azure communicates measurement, attribution, and recovery outcomes.
microsoft_2023: Drove adoption of **AI-driven code generation** workflows across 14 Azure service teams via hands-on demos, technical discovery, and onboarding sessions, **saving 37 engineering hours monthly** and building user trust in the platform.

Influenced product roadmap toward **intent-based YAML generation** by leading 11+ user interviews with technical stakeholders to identify integration gaps and translate complex needs into prioritized requirements.

Migrated documentation to an **AI-powered semantic search** tool with rigorous metadata standards, **cutting lookup time by 83%** and improving data validation and retrieval accuracy for internal teams.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions **28% faster** by aligning 140+ teams on a unified automation prioritization framework, partnering cross-functionally to remove technical blockers.
Led discovery with 20+ service teams to quantify **81 hours of manual toil per region launch**, then built a roadmap to automate critical paths and scale repeatable integration patterns.
Engineered a **Power BI dashboard** tracking operational toil across 140+ teams, enabling leadership to target automation gaps with data-driven prioritization.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot OS migration by defining the rollout strategy and mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations with engineering and ops stakeholders.
Facilitated Agile ceremonies and groomed the backlog to resolve **40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and improving cross-team responsiveness.
Aligned IT, Operations, and Engineering on automated **CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating software deployment cycles by **25%** and reducing manual release toil.
pro_painters: Increased job bookings by **26%** by rolling out a new **CRM process** managing the end-to-end scoping and invoicing lifecycle for 200+ monthly client proposals.
Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversion **2.7%** by executing a digital-first GTM strategy across web, SEO, and Google Business profile optimization.
Sealed margin leaks by running **profitability analysis** across 1,000+ project records, equipping leadership with sharper pricing and attribution models.
